request.prompt_text:
You are extracting stage1 bundle features from a single image.
Return strict JSON only and follow the schema exactly.
Return every question_id exactly once.
Never omit a question_id and never repeat a question_id.
selected_answers must contain unique values only.
Every selected_answers value must be exactly one of the allowed_answers values.
If none is selected, selected_answers must be exactly ['none'].
Never mix none with any other signal.
Bad example: ['none', 'ridge_axis']
Good example 1: ['none']
Good example 2: ['ridge_axis', 'warm_advection']
manifest_id=synoptic_radar_precipitation_stage1
domain=radar_precipitation
stage=stage1
image_ref=rdr_cmp_cmi_202604090000
valid_time=202604090000
Bundles:
1. question_id=stage1_west_sea_signal_bundle | region_id=west_sea | region_label=West Sea | lat_range=35~38N | lon_range=124~126E | allowed_answers=precip_echo|convective_core|rain_band|stratiform_area|localized_maxima|none | question_text=Select every radar precipitation signal present in this region.
2. question_id=stage1_central_korea_signal_bundle | region_id=central_korea | region_label=Central Korea | lat_range=36~38N | lon_range=126~129E | allowed_answers=precip_echo|convective_core|rain_band|stratiform_area|localized_maxima|none | question_text=Select every radar precipitation signal present in this region.
3. question_id=stage1_south_korea_signal_bundle | region_id=south_korea | region_label=South Korea | lat_range=34~36N | lon_range=126~129E | allowed_answers=precip_echo|convective_core|rain_band|stratiform_area|localized_maxima|none | question_text=Select every radar precipitation signal present in this region.
4. question_id=stage1_south_sea_signal_bundle | region_id=south_sea | region_label=South Sea | lat_range=33~35N | lon_range=127~130E | allowed_answers=precip_echo|convective_core|rain_band|stratiform_area|localized_maxima|none | question_text=Select every radar precipitation signal present in this region.
5. question_id=stage1_east_sea_signal_bundle | region_id=east_sea | region_label=East Sea | lat_range=36~39N | lon_range=129~132E | allowed_answers=precip_echo|convective_core|rain_band|stratiform_area|localized_maxima|none | question_text=Select every radar precipitation signal present in this region.

request.prompt_text:
You are extracting stage1 bundle features from a single image.
Return strict JSON only and follow the schema exactly.
Return every question_id exactly once.
Never omit a question_id and never repeat a question_id.
selected_answers must contain unique values only.
Every selected_answers value must be exactly one of the allowed_answers values.
If none is selected, selected_answers must be exactly ['none'].
Never mix none with any other signal.
Bad example: ['none', 'ridge_axis']
Good example 1: ['none']
Good example 2: ['ridge_axis', 'warm_advection']
manifest_id=synoptic_radar_precipitation_stage1
domain=radar_precipitation
stage=stage1
image_ref=rdr_cmp_cmi_202604091200
valid_time=202604091200
Bundles:
1. question_id=stage1_west_sea_signal_bundle | region_id=west_sea | region_label=West Sea | lat_range=35~38N | lon_range=124~126E | allowed_answers=precip_echo|convective_core|rain_band|stratiform_area|localized_maxima|none | question_text=Select every radar precipitation signal present in this region.
2. question_id=stage1_central_korea_signal_bundle | region_id=central_korea | region_label=Central Korea | lat_range=36~38N | lon_range=126~129E | allowed_answers=precip_echo|convective_core|rain_band|stratiform_area|localized_maxima|none | question_text=Select every radar precipitation signal present in this region.
3. question_id=stage1_south_korea_signal_bundle | region_id=south_korea | region_label=South Korea | lat_range=34~36N | lon_range=126~129E | allowed_answers=precip_echo|convective_core|rain_band|stratiform_area|localized_maxima|none | question_text=Select every radar precipitation signal present in this region.
4. question_id=stage1_south_sea_signal_bundle | region_id=south_sea | region_label=South Sea | lat_range=33~35N | lon_range=127~130E | allowed_answers=precip_echo|convective_core|rain_band|stratiform_area|localized_maxima|none | question_text=Select every radar precipitation signal present in this region.

content.text: {"answers":[{"question_id":"stage1_west_sea_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["precip_echo","stratiform_area"] ,"note":"West Sea region shows areas of general precipitation echo and some widespread stratiform rain areas without strong core or band structures."},{"question_id":"stage1_central_korea_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["precip_echo","stratiform_area"] ,"note":"Central Korea has general precipitation echo with broad stratiform areas, no distinct convective cores or rain bands."},{"question_id":"stage1_south_korea_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["convective_core","precip_echo","stratiform_area","localized_maxima"] ,"note":"South Korea displays strong convective cores in southern and southeastern parts, surrounded by widespread precipitation and stratiform areas, with localized maxima indicating intense precipitation spots."},{"question_id":"stage1_south_sea_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["convective_core","rain_band","precip_echo","localized_maxima"] ,"note":"South Sea region shows prominent convective cores and rain bands with heavy localized maxima as well as general precipitation echoes."},{"question_id":"stage1_east_sea_signal_bundle","selected_answers":["precip_echo","stratiform_area"] ,"note":"East Sea features wide stratiform precipitation and general echoes without isolated cores or rain bands."}]}

answers.note: West Sea region shows areas of general precipitation echo and some widespread stratiform rain areas without strong core or band structures.
Central Korea has general precipitation echo with broad stratiform areas, no distinct convective cores or rain bands.

South Korea displays strong convective cores in southern and southeastern parts, surrounded by widespread precipitation and stratiform areas, with localized maxima indicating intense precipitation spots.
South Sea region shows prominent convective cores and rain bands with heavy localized maxima as well as general precipitation echoes.
East Sea features wide stratiform precipitation and general echoes without isolated cores or rain bands.
